2023-24 Rice Owls Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 11-21 (5-13, 10th in AAC MBB)

Coach: Scott Pera

PS/G: 72.0 (228th of 362)

PA/G: 75.7 (285th of 362)

SRS: -3.22 (197th of 362)

SOS: 1.97 (112th of 362)

ORtg: 105.4 (198th of 362)

DRtg: 110.8 (334th of 362)
